name: lattice-web
comment: Exact-pinned. No carets, no tildes. The downstream agent installs exactly what was researched and verified against the npm registry on 2026-06-03. Bump deliberately, never incidentally; if a version fails to resolve, stop and report. This app is a milestone-3 component: do not run npm install here until the CP core and CLI are green. The overrides pin Next's transitive postcss to the patched 8.5.15 (GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93); not exploitable here since postcss only processes our own build-time CSS, but it keeps the dependency audit clean.
